planningOnlyJustification: Product-to-planning pass creates planning maturity artifacts only; runtime implementation remains governed by the full-delivery chain after planning maturity.

certification.notes: Planning artifacts are present. Status remains in_progress because transition guard blocked specs_hardened promotion; no implementation certification is claimed.

completedPhaseClaims.notes: Authored SCOPE-5 deliverables: transport-branch policy guard (internal/assistant/intent/policyguard/transport_branch.go + 5 unit tests PASS incl. real-repo cleanliness), transport_hint unit coverage (internal/assistant/httpadapter/transport_hint_test.go PASS, 4 sub-tests), transport parity integration test (tests/integration/assistant/transport_parity_test.go), policy guard integration mirror (tests/integration/policy/transport_branch_guard_test.go), live-stack e2e suite (tests/e2e/assistant/http_live_stack_test.go), hint-neutrality e2e (appended to tests/e2e/assistant/http_turn_test.go), and stress smoke (tests/stress/assistant/http_turn_stress_test.go PASS, p95=40µs under 50ms budget, per-user limiter partition + row-family invariants asserted). go vet -tags e2e and go vet -tags stress clean. Integration parity test + integration policy guard mirror blocked from execution by foreign untracked work in internal/config (assistant_frontend.go/assistant_intent_trace.go/assistant_tools.go — spec 071/072) and internal/assistant/facade_intent_trace.go (spec 071) — same blocker pattern documented under SCOPE-1b/1c/2/3/4 uncertainty declarations. Live e2e GREEN not-run because CORE_EXTERNAL_URL was not exported in this session. Scope status In Progress pending live integration + e2e GREEN once foreign blockers heal.

executionHistory.summary: Bootstrapped HTTP transport adapter spec to fill the E2E-testability + multi-frontend gap. Confirmed spec 061 already defines the TransportAdapter contract and the closed-vocabulary 'web' transport token; this spec adds the concrete HTTP adapter + bearer-authed POST /api/assistant/turn route plus E2E suite that drives the live stack without Telegram. 11 BDD scenarios (SCN-069-A01..A11) cover auth, disambig/confirm/reset round-trips, capture-as-fallback, golden wire-schema pinning, transport-hint vocabulary, rate limits, and the Telegram-free E2E suite.

Created design.md for the assistant HTTP transport, including POST /api/assistant/turn contract, request/response schemas, adapter foundation, auth/scope/rate/body/CORS behavior, observability, and scenario-to-test mapping. Routed implementation planning to bubbles.plan.

Created scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, test-plan.json, report.md, and uservalidation.md for HTTP adapter contract, auth and limits, callback round trips, reset and capture rendering, and transport parity. Artifact lint passed; transition guard blocked specs_hardened promotion due current worktree source edits, unchecked implementation DoD, missing execution evidence, dependency and retro gates, and guard-required plan detail gaps.

Mode metadata reconciliation only. spec.md declares Workflow Mode: full-delivery (authoritative owner intent set 2026-05-31); prior bubbles.plan run defensively wrote workflowMode=product-to-planning, statusCeiling=specs_hardened, planningOnly=true while operating under a planning-only workflow. Reconciled state.json to workflowMode=full-delivery, statusCeiling=done, planningOnly=false; preserved planMaturityOnly=true because planning artifacts are complete and no implementation evidence exists yet. certification.status remains in_progress; no implementation, test, or certification claims made.

Scope 2-4 split mirror of the Scope 1a precedent. Extended Scope 1 cross-spec ownership to cover every newly-deferred spec 068 scenario (SCN-068-A01, SCN-068-A02, SCN-068-A03, SCN-068-A04, SCN-068-A05, SCN-068-A09) in addition to existing SCN-068-A06/A07. Added 8 cross-spec e2e Test Plan rows pointing at the same tests/e2e/assistant/intent_*_test.go files spec 068 deferred, extended the Cross-spec ownership note and Scope 1 DoD checkbox accordingly, updated Scope Inventory row and Execution Outline validation checkpoint, and added 6 cross-spec scenario entries (crossSpecOriginSpec=068-structured-intent-compiler) plus matching traceabilityGuardScenarioIds entries in scenario-manifest.json. test-plan.json Scope 1 gained 8 cross-spec rows. uservalidation.md baseline checklist extended. Scenario IDs preserved verbatim; no inverse dependency added. No source code, tests, configs, ML, docs, or unrelated specs touched. workflowMode/ceiling/status unchanged.

SCOPE-5 — Transport Parity, Hint Neutrality, and Live E2E Suite. Authored all 6 planned test files plus the transport-branch policy guard implementation. In-process tests GREEN: transport_hint_test (4 sub-tests), transport_branch unit + real-repo cleanliness (5 sub-tests), HTTP stress smoke (p95=40µs). go vet -tags e2e and -tags stress both clean. Integration parity + integration policy-guard mirror blocked by foreign untracked spec 071/072 work in internal/config and internal/assistant; live e2e GREEN not-run (no CORE_EXTERNAL_URL). DoD scope updated to reflect 5/8 items checked with executed/interpreted evidence; 3 items remain unchecked with explicit not-run Uncertainty Declarations pointing at the foreign-blocker section.

Rework planning: added SCOPE-1d 'HTTPAdapter Construction and LateBound Binding' for finding F-069-ADAPTER-NOT-BOUND. Root cause: cmd/core/wiring_assistant_facade.go::wireAssistantFacade only constructs the Telegram assistant_adapter and never calls httpadapter.NewHTTPAdapter or svc.assistantHTTPHandler.SetAdapter/SetMiddleware, so every live POST /api/assistant/turn returns HTTP 503. This blocks every live-stack e2e/integration row in Scopes 1–5 (surfaced as spec 074 F074-04B-ASSISTANT-HTTP-LATE-BIND test-infra finding). Planning artifacts updated: scopes.md (new Scope 1d detail, scope inventory row, validation checkpoint, Scope 2 dependency bumped to include 1d), scenario-manifest.json (SCN-069-A12 traceability + scenarios entry with findingRefs to F-069-ADAPTER-NOT-BOUND and F074-04B-ASSISTANT-HTTP-LATE-BIND auto-resolution), test-plan.json (SCOPE-1d test rows incl. canary + regression re-assertion), uservalidation.md baseline extended, currentScope set to SCOPE-1d. No source, tests, or docs touched. Returning route_required to dispatch bubbles.implement for SCOPE-1d execution.

Dependency resolution for SCOPE-1d: promoted the AssistantConfig HTTP SST contract (HTTPEnabled, HTTPSchemaVersion, HTTPBodySizeMaxBytes, HTTPRateLimitPerUserPerMinute, HTTPConversationTTL, HTTPRequiredScope, HTTPCORSAllowedOrigins, HTTPTransportHintAllowlist) out of SCOPE-2 into a new foundation scope SCOPE-1c-bis 'HTTP Transport SST Contract' landing between SCOPE-1 and SCOPE-1d. SCOPE-1d depends-on now includes SCOPE-1c-bis (resolves the original cycle where 1d needed cfg.Assistant.HTTP* but 2 owned it). SCOPE-2 narrowed to consume the typed config rather than own it; the `TestAssistantHTTPTransportConfigRequiresEverySSTKey` unit row moved from SCOPE-2 to SCOPE-1c-bis. New scenario SCN-069-A13 added (config behaviorClass, scopeId SCOPE-1c-bis). Updated artifacts: scopes.md (new Scope 1c-bis detail block, scope inventory row, validation checkpoint, Scope 1d Depends On + wiring rationale, Scope 2 Depends On/Surfaces/Implementation Plan/Test Plan/DoD), scenario-manifest.json (traceability list + scenarios array), test-plan.json (new SCOPE-1c-bis block), state.json (this entry; currentScope set to SCOPE-1c-bis). No source, tests, or docs touched. Returning route_required to dispatch bubbles.implement for SCOPE-1c-bis execution.
